findings.summary: Orchestrator polling loop killed by Bash tool 2-minute timeout
findings.evidence: pipeline_orchestrator.py cmd_run() polls every 30s. Bash tool has 120s default. Orchestrator crashed twice. Fell back to manual wave launches.
findings.proposed_fix: Add --launch-only mode or run via user shell (! prefix)

findings.summary: finalize_stage lazy-imported variant_evidence_core — 95/114 Modal images don't mount it
findings.evidence: T4 wired write_json_atomic into finalize_stage. Canary caught ModuleNotFoundError. Fix: try/except fallback.
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: verify imported module available in ALL Modal images before adding to modal_utils.py

findings.summary: 23 scripts hardcoded old Nebula VCF path after DV switch
findings.evidence: 6 Modal + 17 local scripts used {SAMPLE_ID}.vcf.gz instead of INPUT_VCF. Required 3 fix commits.
findings.proposed_fix: Lint check in just validate: grep for hardcoded .vcf.gz paths not using INPUT_VCF

findings.summary: 11 duplicate Modal apps from repeated orchestrator crashes
findings.evidence: 4x slivar, 3x cpsr, 2x vep running simultaneously. ~$1-2 wasted.
findings.proposed_fix: Orchestrator should check modal app list for running stages before launching

findings.summary: modal run --detach launch timeout too short for large images
findings.evidence: 60s then 180s both insufficient for CPSR/GLIMPSE2/slivar. Had to launch manually.
findings.proposed_fix: Use 300s timeout or async launch pattern
